title: Wither Death Sounds
description: a Wither Spawning Sound when a player dies just like Unstable SMP
body:
A Wither Death Sound plays when a player dies

# NOTE: THIS MOD IS IN BETA, SOME STUFF WONT PLAY THE SOUND, GO TO THE BUTTOM OF THIS PAGE TO FIND WHAT WORKS AND WHAT DOESNT WORK!

Global Sound Commands (500 blocks):

## Global Settings

Choose if you hear the sound from 500 blocks away (Global OFF) or the whole world/server (Global On)

### Global ON Command:

/function global_sound:global_on

### Global OFF Command:

/function global_sound:global_off

Showcase Video:
